evidence_contract.question: For generalized SV y_t = beta s_t + exp(h_t/2) epsilon_t, can CUT4 and Zhao-Cui evaluate the same likelihood and score target?
evidence_contract.baseline_or_comparator: P45-M0 target registry and P45-M1 scalar-only Zhao-Cui blocker. No same-target comparator is available for generalized SV under current code.
evidence_contract.primary_promotion_criterion: Same-target promotion requires matching native/transform/Jacobian, reference route, CUT4 route, Zhao-Cui route, observations, parameter vector, and score checks; otherwise record blocker/nonclaim.
veto_diagnostics: log(y_t^2) or transformed residual treated as exact native generalized SV
mixture or moment-matched Kalman described as exact native likelihood
prior independence of s_t and h_t treated as posterior independence
same-target comparison after M1 scalar-only blocker

commands.purpose: Run P45-M2 generalized-SV blocker/nonclaim tests with inherited M0/M1 governance tests.
Compile the P45-M2 generalized-SV blocker test.
Check whitespace safety for the P45-M2 test artifact.

diagnostics.summary: M2 records generalized-SV same-target equality as blocked under current code and preserves native, transformed, and approximation route distinctions.

long_run_controls.resource_caps: No long run; CPU-only focused tests and artifact validation.
